name: Sweet Life cafe atmospheric hero
prompt: Sweet Life cafe atmospheric hero shot. Warm interior, speckled ceramic mugs, soft afternoon window light, a bingsu and a latte on a worn-wood table, blurred figure of staff in the background. Hero for home page.

name: Sweet Life featured signature spread
prompt: Three signature Sweet Life items arranged on warm cream linen: a taro bingsu, a milk tea, a Korean dessert. Three-quarter angle, soft natural light, editorial. Wide hero.

name: Menu page hero
prompt: Top-down view of a Sweet Life table laden with seven menu items: bingsu, souffle pancake, golden toast, milk tea, latte, bao bun, sushi roll. Warm cream linen tablecloth, scattered napkins, soft natural light. Wide hero banner.

name: About page cafe interior wide
prompt: Sweet Life cafe interior. Warm wood floors, hanging Edison bulbs, marble counter, espresso machine in background. Empty mid-morning, soft window light. Editorial wide angle.

name: Hands plating a bingsu
prompt: Close-up of hands plating a bingsu, pouring condensed milk over freshly-shaved ice in a ceramic bowl, apron in soft focus, warm light. Editorial food preparation.

name: Contact page cafe exterior
prompt: Sweet Life cafe exterior. Newry brick frontage, wooden sign with painted lettering, doorway with worn wooden door slightly ajar, planters with greenery, soft cloudy daylight. Subtle, inviting.

name: Bingsu section hero
prompt: Three bingsu desserts arranged in a row: taro, matcha, oreo. Warm cream linen, soft window light, three-quarter angle. Section hero card.

name: Drinks section hero
prompt: Five Sweet Life drinks in a row on marble table: milk tea, fruit tea, frappe, smoothie, milkshake. Tall slender glasses with citrus garnishes, soft natural light. Section hero card.

name: Cakes section hero
prompt: A glass cake display case. Slices of chocolate cake, carrot cake, lemon meringue, rocky road, cookies and brownies arranged on wooden trays. Warm bakery light. Section hero card.

name: Coffee and tea section hero
prompt: Espresso machine pulling a shot. Steam, crema in the cup, latte with rosetta art, warm wood counter, soft morning light. Section hero card.

name: Lunch mains section hero
prompt: A Sweet Life table set for lunch: a pulled pork burger with fries, a Bibimbap bowl, a Sourdough Pizza, a panini. Speckled ceramic and wooden boards, warm midday light. Section hero card.

name: Breakfast and brunch hero
prompt: Acai granola bowl, French toast with maple syrup, salmon sunrise bagel, and a flat white on a warm wood breakfast table. Soft golden morning light. Section hero card.

name: Pancakes and waffles hero
prompt: A Belgian waffle stack with maple syrup, strawberries and ice cream alongside a tall fluffy souffle pancake on speckled ceramic. Warm afternoon light. Section hero card.

name: Bakery hero
prompt: A bakery basket with fresh croissants (plain, pistachio, ham and cheese), scones, a danish, a sausage roll on a wooden board. Warm bakery light, slight steam rising. Section hero card.

name: Salads section hero
prompt: Three fresh salads in white ceramic bowls: caprese, caesar, mango mozzarella. Warm wood, garnish of basil and balsamic, soft natural light, top-down three-quarter. Section hero card.

name: Keto Vegan GF section hero
prompt: A vegan kiev with side salad, a GF chocolate fudge cake slice, and a keto omelette plated together on speckled ceramic. Soft natural light, editorial. Section hero card.

name: Sushi platter hero
prompt: A Sweet Life sushi platter: 16 assorted pieces (salmon nigiri, futomaki, california rolls) on a slate board, garnished with pickled ginger, wasabi and soy dish, warm subtle light. Section hero card.

name: Golden Toast hero
prompt: A Korean golden toast. Thick brioche cube hollowed and filled with strawberry, mixed berry, soft ice cream and condensed milk drizzle, dusted with sugar, served on ceramic. Section hero card.

name: Customer enjoying bingsu
prompt: Customer at Sweet Life enjoying a bingsu. Hand holding a spoon over the ice mound, partial face in soft focus, cafe interior background, warm afternoon light, candid editorial.

name: Staff pouring a latte
prompt: Sweet Life barista pouring a latte. Milk pitcher in motion, rosetta forming in the cup, focused hands in soft apron, cafe counter, warm wood and brass details, golden hour light.

name: Friends sharing dessert
prompt: Two friends at a Sweet Life table sharing a bingsu and two milk teas, candid laughter, partial faces, cafe interior with hanging lights, warm evening glow. Editorial lifestyle.

name: Newry storefront at dusk
prompt: Sweet Life cafe exterior at dusk. Warm window light spilling onto the Newry pavement, brick facade, painted sign 'Sweet Life', a couple walking by, soft blue hour sky.

name: Detail shot coffee book light
prompt: Tabletop detail: a half-finished latte with rosetta still visible, a paperback book splayed open, hand wrapped around the warm mug, soft afternoon window light, marble table. Editorial moment.
